payload.tactic: conseq (: _ ==> (g ^ G1.u \in map (fun (t : ciphertext) => t.`1) G3.cilog) /\ (G1.g_ ^ G1.u' \in map (fun (t : ciphertext) => t.`2) G3.cilog) /\ (g ^ r' \in map (fun (t : ciphertext) => t.`3) G3.cilog) /\ (g ^ r \in map (fun (t : ciphertext) => t.`4) G3.cilog) /\ size G3.cilog <= PKE_.qD /\ G1.w <> zero /\ G1.g_ = g ^ G1.w).
